title: Save The Leaf Bug
description: That leaf bug almost bit it. But he's not pushing up daisies just yet.
longDescription:
Deep in the forest, on a branch, lives a leaf bug. Small. Unassuming. Minding his own business in the way only a leaf bug can.

He has survived predators, forest fires, one very loud creature with strong opinions about trees being cut down and at least one tractor beam. He has endured.

But those forest stumps are multiplying. And the leaf bug, unbothered and blissfully unaware of how close he keeps coming to a very unfortunate end, continues to go about his day.

He is not asking for much. Just a branch with some leaves (those things that make the air we breathe) and maybe a little quiet.

Save the leaf bug.
